mapper.select: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN stat_date = #{today} THEN call_count ELSE 0 END) AS todayCalls, SUM(CASE WHEN stat_date = #{today} THEN tokens_total ELSE 0 END) AS todayTokens, SUM(CASE WHEN stat_date = #{today} THEN total_cost_yuan ELSE 0 END) AS todayCost, ROUND( CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN stat_date = #{today} THEN call_count ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN SUM(CASE WHEN stat_date = #{today} THEN success_count ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / SUM(CASE WHEN stat_date = #{today} THEN call_count ELSE 0 END) ELSE 0 END, 2 ) AS successRate, SUM(CASE WHEN stat_date = #{yesterday} THEN call_count ELSE 0 END) AS yesterdayCalls, SUM(CASE WHEN stat_date = #{yesterday} THEN tokens_total ELSE 0 END) AS yesterdayTokens, SUM(CASE WHEN stat_date = #{yesterday} THEN total_cost_yuan ELSE 0 END) AS yesterdayCost, ROUND( CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN stat_date = #{yesterday} THEN call_count ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN SUM(CASE WHEN stat_date = #{yesterday} THEN success_count ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / SUM(CASE WHEN stat_date = #{yesterday} THEN call_count ELSE 0 END) ELSE 0 END, 2 ) AS yesterdaySuccessRate FROM ai_token_usage_daily WHERE stat_date IN (#{today}, #{yesterday})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_token_usage_daily (stat_date, model_name, agent_id, skill_id, scene_id, module_key, call_count, success_count, fail_count, tokens_input, tokens_output, tokens_total, total_duration_ms, total_cost_yuan, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{statDate}, #{modelName}, #{agentId}, #{skillId}, #{sceneId}, #{moduleKey}, #{callCount}, #{successCount}, #{failCount}, #{tokensInput}, #{tokensOutput}, #{tokensTotal}, #{totalDurationMs}, #{totalCostYuan}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_token_usage_daily SET call_count = call_count + #{callCount}, success_count = success_count + #{successCount}, fail_count = fail_count + #{failCount}, tokens_input = tokens_input + #{tokensInput}, tokens_output = tokens_output + #{tokensOutput}, tokens_total = tokens_total + #{tokensTotal}, total_duration_ms = total_duration_ms + #{totalDurationMs}, total_cost_yuan = total_cost_yuan + #{totalCostYuan}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE stat_date = #{statDate} AND model_name = #{modelName} AND IFNULL(agent_id, 0) = IFNULL(#{agentId}, 0) AND IFNULL(skill_id, 0) = IFNULL(#{skillId}, 0) AND IFNULL(scene_id, 0) = IFNULL(#{sceneId}, 0) AND IFNULL(module_key, '') = IFNULL(#{moduleKey}, '')
